case_description: Bag regression variant: same product category, different market angle and copy, focused on commute and daily organization.

inputs.source_note: User provided bag reference video frozen for regression case creation.

project.name: case-003-bag-commuter-variant
project.notes: Bag regression variant: same product category, different market angle and copy, focused on commute and daily organization.

sequence.persuasive_goal: Position the handbag as a stylish daily carry bag for commute, errands, and travel.

spu.prompt_text: Create a 9:16 TikTok ecommerce video segment for an everyday commuter handbag. Preserve the pacing of a viral bag product demo: quick opening hook, hand-held product reveal, interior capacity shot, strap/detail close-up, and a final lifestyle carry moment. Use warm daylight, neutral wardrobe styling, realistic leather texture, organized compartments, no captions, no watermark, no fake logos.
spu.negative_prompt_text: blurry, warped bag shape, broken zipper, extra straps, fake logos, watermark, captions, text overlay, low quality, distorted hands

visual_constraints.camera: smooth handheld push-in, detail close-ups, elegant product handling

vbu.script_text: Meet the bag that keeps your day organized without sacrificing style. Room for your essentials, polished enough for work, and easy enough for every errand after.
